acceptance_criteria: file runs directly under node with type stripping (no transpile step)
tsc --noEmit reports zero errors for this file

description: Rename tools/lib/gen3-renderers.mjs to .ts and add types using ONLY erasable syntax (type annotations, interfaces, type-only imports — no enums, no namespaces, no parameter properties) so Node type-stripping runs it directly with zero build step. Preserve behavior exactly: same exports, same CLI flags, same output. While converting, audit for silent catches and uninstrumented error paths — fix in place (structured stderr line with area+severity+hint). Update all importers' specifiers in the same change.
title: Convert gen3-renderers.mjs to erasable-syntax TypeScript

acceptance_criteria: gate command exit 0 with output equivalent to pre-conversion run
description: Run the module gate and the tool's own --selftest/--help surface for tools/lib/gen3-renderers.mjs pre- and post-conversion; attach the diff-free evidence to the task. Any intentional output change must be listed explicitly with a reason.
title: Record behavior-parity evidence for gen3-renderers.mjs

acceptance_criteria: npm run dev serves the shell with tokens applied
description: Create web/: Vite + Preact + strict TS. src/tokens.css implements 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE exactly (ink #0E1420 ground, blueprint grid at 6-8% white, cyan #5FD4F4 structure, amber #F4B860 lease, green #7BC97B pass, red #E5484D fail, paper #F3EFE6 light ground; IBM Plex Mono + Space Grotesk self-hosted woff2; 4px grid; corner-tick section frames — no drop shadows). src/strings.ts holds every user-facing string from commit one. Theme via :root[data-theme], dark canonical. prefers-reduced-motion collapses all motion to fades. This task is design-defining: Fable implements or reviews rendered output against 04 before the gate passes.
title: web/ scaffold — Preact+Vite+TS, Blueprint Ledger foundations

acceptance_criteria: entry/example exists and the command actually runs

acceptance_criteria: a newcomer can state the file's purpose after reading only the header

Written for a curious newcomer: no acronym without a docs/GLOSSARY.md link, no insider references. Keep the existing first-line shebang/imports untouched.
title: Add a WHY header to gen3-renderers.mjs
